cit.basis: 30% CIT on resident companies (Income Tax Act, Cap 470); 37.5% on non-resident companies operating through a branch (permanent establishment).
cit.note: Administered by the Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA). EPZ enterprises pay 0% for the first ten years and 25% for the next ten years; special economic zone and sector-specific rates are out of scope for this SME estimator.

vat.note: 16% standard VAT rate (VAT Act 2013); zero-rated and exempt supplies apply to specific goods and services.

significant_economic_presence_tax.note: 3% Significant Economic Presence (SEP) tax on gross turnover of non-residents supplying services over a digital marketplace to Kenyan users; replaced the 1.5% Digital Service Tax (Finance Act 2024).

minimum_top_up_tax.note: Minimum top-up tax (Pillar Two domestic minimum top-up tax, QDMTT) applies from 2025 to in-scope multinational groups (consolidated revenue >= EUR 750m) with an effective rate below 15%.

turnover_tax.note: 1.5% turnover tax for small businesses with annual turnover between KES 1 million and KES 25 million, in lieu of standard CIT.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
EPZ/SEZ incentives, turnover tax eligibility, SEP tax, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
